title: ModelEngine-Group/nexent
description: Nexent is a zero-code platform for auto-generating production-grade AI agents using Harness Engineering principles — unified tools, skills, memory, and orchestration with built-in constraints, feedback loops, and control planes.

title: AltimateAI/altimate-code
description: Open-source agentic data engineering harness for dbt, SQL, and cloud warehouses. 100+ tools, 10 warehouses, AI-powered.

title: bgdnvk/clanker
description: autonomous systems engineering cli agent for any cloud environment: AWS, GCP, Cloudflare, etc

title: affaan-m/everything-claude-code
description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

title: bytedance/deer-flow
description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

title: rohitg00/agentmemory
description: #1 Persistent memory for AI coding agents based on real-world benchmarks

title: codejunkie99/agentic-stack
description: One brain, many harnesses. Portable .agent/ folder (memory + skills + protocols) that plugs into Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, OpenCode, OpenClaw, Hermes, or DIY Python — and keeps its knowledge when you switch.

title: systempromptio/systemprompt-code-orchestrator
description: [DEPRECATED] Superseded by systempromptio/systemprompt-template and systempromptio/systemprompt-core. MCP server for orchestrating AI coding agents (Claude Code CLI & Gemini CLI).

title: systempromptio/systemprompt-mcp-server
description: [DEPRECATED] Superseded by systempromptio/systemprompt-template and systempromptio/systemprompt-core. Reference MCP server implementation (OAuth 2.1, tools, prompts, resources, sampling, notifications).

【Timee AI Sprint Day7】Agent Harness Group 設立に寄せて —— 「個」から「組織」、その先の「並走」へ
description: AIエージェント開発におけるハーネスの概念と重要性を解説。モデル・コンテキスト・ハーネスをCPU・RAM・OSに例え、組織的なAI開発への展開を論じる記事。
